constructor-arg.value: TO_HEX(SHA256(CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', columnId, '#', classPK))) AS sha256HexId
( SELECT *, {sha256HexId} FROM `{stagingTable}`, UNNEST(expandoFields) WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND (type = '{organizationType}' OR type = '{userType}') )
( SELECT {selectFields}, {sha256HexId} FROM `{stagingTable}` WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND type = '{type}' )
(SELECT ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT columnId FROM UNNEST(expandoFields))) AS expandoColumnIds
(SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS {fieldType}) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = '{fieldName}') AS {fieldAlias}
